# Performance Interpreting Ltd

> The UK and Ireland's leading Deaf access consultancy and BSL & ISL interpreting service for live events.

Performance Interpreting provides British Sign Language (BSL) and Irish Sign Language (ISL) interpreting for concerts, festivals, sport, arenas, theatre and live entertainment. Founded in 2017 and inducted into Signature's Hall of Fame, PI operates as a consultancy — not just a supplier.

## Services

- **BSL Interpreting**: British Sign Language interpreting for live events across the UK. NRCPD-registered interpreters specialising in music, sport, theatre, comedy and entertainment.
- **ISL Interpreting**: Irish Sign Language interpreting for events across Ireland and Northern Ireland.
- **Deaf Access Consultancy**: End-to-end access planning — legal compliance advisory (Equality Act 2010), access audits, interpreter team design, production coordination and on-site management.
- **Full Access Packages**: Complete access coordination including BSL, ISL, live captions and induction loop systems.
- **PI Academy**: NRCPD-approved CPD training, mentoring and professional development for interpreters.
- **PI Events App**: Free app for Deaf attendees — interpreted event listings, on-site support tools, communication cards, speech-to-text, and post-event feedback.

## Key Facts

- 500+ events per year, thousands delivered in total
- 27+ major festivals (BST Hyde Park, Download, Reading, Leeds, Creamfields, Wireless)
- 6 Premier League clubs (Arsenal, Chelsea, Fulham, West Ham, Wembley Stadium, England Netball)
- 10+ national arenas (The O2, Royal Albert Hall, Croke Park, OVO Hydro, Southbank Centre)
- Signature Hall of Fame inductee
- Landmark Little Mix BSL legal precedent — PI's testimony established BSL access at live events as a legal requirement
- BSL interpreting at every Wembley Stadium concert as standard
- Selected for Royal events and state ceremonies
- 5.0 rating on Google (33 reviews), 100% recommended on Facebook

## Coverage

United Kingdom and Ireland. Headquartered in Sidcup, Greater London.

## Pricing

Pricing is based on event type, duration, venue and interpreter team size. Contact for a tailored quote. All interpreters are NRCPD-registered.

## Company

Performance Interpreting Limited. Company No. 10684652. VAT No. 265 5979 48. Registered office: Onega House, 112 Main Road, Sidcup, United Kingdom, DA14 6NE.
